name: ASRock B760 Pro RS/D4 ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR4-5333(OC) - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - M.2 Key E for WiFi - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-C+A - DisplayPort 1.4 - HDMI 2.1 - Dragon 2.5G LAN
